name: Chunky Buttermilk-Cucumber Dressing
recipeInstructions:
Buttermilk's flavor is similar to sour cream. Add your favorite spices for salad dressing - or fruit and honey for a refreshing drink.
1. Peel the cucumber. Cut it in half lengthwise. Scrape out and discard the seeds. Grate the cucumber coarsely into a small bowl. Stir in salt, sugar, and vinegar. Let stand at least 10 minutes. Drain well and discard any remaining liquid.
2. In a jar with a tight-fitting lid, combine buttermilk, yogurt, lemon juice, dill, green onion, parsley, garlic, and pepper. Add the drained cucumber to the mixture. Shake well to combine.
3. Refrigerate the dressing. Stored in the refrigerator, this salad dressing will keep for up to 3 days.
